有CP有CP有CP说三遍有CP】
在末世挣扎求十年，她重生回到了天灾来临之前。
她当然要疯狂囤货……
但钱从哪来？
一个普通的打工人，卡里没有随随便便几十亿存款，也没有什么一大笔遗产，卡里就那里攒下的工资。
面对即将到来的极热、极寒、地震、火山、连续几年的酸雨、变异的生物……各种各样的天灾、人祸，她必须要做足准备。
可没钱怎么办——
那就搞钱！疯狂的搞钱！
买买买！能买的全部都买！
吃的、喝的、用的、穿的。
不囤够下辈子的物资，绝不能停手！
同时有仇报仇、有怨报怨，欺负过她的，全部加倍奉还。
再来一次的末世，姜诺要活得滋滋润润、快意舒畅！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/80f3f556af7a64c2f3d45620c7e72797","author":"爱地八音","author_id":"","book_id":"7160871179534732299","book_name":"重生天灾，姐有点凶，不服憋着","book_short_name":"末日众生","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e04828","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":23,"name":"种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=23&name=种田&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":86,"name":"女强","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=86&name=女强&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":494,"name":"囤物资","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=494&name=囤物资&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":828,"name":"基建","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=828&name=基建&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7160872212805714447","read_count":"62470","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1089562"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"465","tags":"科幻末世,种田,重生,空间,末世,女强,囤物资,基建","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/5c14af50560624dffd585295e6d95562~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779316601&x-signature=UyWpNM1bqEN0mb7hF%2BrthW9NViE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1068331629292061","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"5.11006
